agent.emptyState: What would you like to do?

accounts.listed: I found {count} accounts for your organization.

entry.proposed: Proposed entry of {amount}. Please review the details below.
entry.posted: Entry #{entry_number} has been posted to the ledger.
entry.rejected: Proposal rejected. The entry will not be posted.

error.tool_validation_failed: I was unable to format a valid request after {retries} attempts. Please rephrase what you'd like to do.
error.structured_response_missing: I had trouble formatting a response. Please try again.

why.novel_pattern: Novel pattern — the agent has not seen this before.

if_rejected.journal_entry: The entry will not be posted. You can edit and resubmit.
if_rejected.reversal: The original entry remains on the ledger.
